top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indian Banks Line Up $2.5 Billion Debt Sales Using RBI Swap
top_signals.summary: At least four lenders including the State Bank of India are preparing to raise about $2.5 billion selling bonds in the coming weeks, tapping a Reserve Bank of India facility that makes it cheaper to borrow dollars, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board announces that results from its annual bank stress test will be released on Wednesday, June 24, at 4 p.m. EDT.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Santander Surpasses Inditex as Spain’s Most Valuable Company
top_signals.summary: Banco Santander SA has become Spain’s most valuable listed company, overtaking Zara owner Inditex SA for the first time in eight years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK regulator plans to dilute capital rules for investment banks’ trading activities
top_signals.summary: PRA says softening Basel regulations will keep Britain aligned with US and EU
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Franklin Templeton files for ETFs that reinvest stock dividends into bitcoin
top_signals.summary: Franklin has filed for two new ETFs that would reinvest stock dividends into BTC, with an expected effective date as early as Sept. 1, 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
